task: OpenClaw Gmail lookup and evidence-backed content brief

governance_bootstrap.summary: Customer-facing code needs evidence mapping, real entrypoint verification, and residual-risk reporting when a gate is incomplete.
OpenClaw Slack ingress is Mac Mini only; customer-facing changes need completion evidence and explicit non-completion when Red Team is blocked.

verification.name: OpenClaw Gmail brief unit and regression suite
verification.result: 69 tests passed, including headers-only lookup, body-backed brief, partial-result, private-body session-persistence, KST timestamp filtering, and sanitized runtime-error cases.

verification.name: Configured Gmail runtime through OpenClaw user-facing agent entrypoint
verification.command: .venv/bin/python inline call to openclaw_agent.run('오늘 온 메일 내용 요약해') with response content suppressed
verification.result: gmail_kst_brief_runtime=pass; response began with a valid Gmail brief or no-mail response and measured 1653 characters without exposing mailbox content.

verification.name: Mac Mini OpenClaw Slack listener deployment and process verification
verification.target: Mac Mini launchd Slack Socket Mode service
verification.command: scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh adapters/content/openclaw_agent.py; ssh macmini launchctl kickstart and launchctl print
verification.result: Targeted checkout matched origin/main with diff 0; backup scratch/pre_deploy_backup_20260720_221710 created; com.harness.slack-listener state=running pid=3962; log confirmed a new Socket Mode session and Bolt app running.

deploy.result: Targeted Mac Mini deploy passed origin/main diff verification and Slack listener was restarted successfully.

residual_risk: Mac Mini Slack listener has not received this commit because production deployment is blocked pending required independent Red Team review.
Authenticated Claude and Copilot reviews both returned red_team_residual_risk; review artifacts record remaining production Slack-path verification.
A real post-deploy Slack DM response has not yet been observed; listener process and Socket Mode connection are verified.
This commit establishes Gmail as the first reference adapter. The all-intent verifier architecture remains planned work.
